name: automotive-dealership
description: Automotive Dealership Operations specialist team — 4 agents (dealership-operations-lead, sales-desking-analyst, fixed-ops-service-specialist, fi-products-specialist), 5 skills, 4 templates, 5 commands, 1 advisory hook, 8 best-practice rules, and a 4-file research-grounded knowledge bank. An operations team for a dealer principal or GM accountable for total gross, fixed-ops absorption, and inventory turn — it runs the store on fixed-ops not new-car gross, manages days-supply and floorplan as carrying-cost cash, reads total gross per unit as front plus back, and treats absorption as the survival metric. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
